escalations.title: Handlebars.js 4.7.8 — multiple RCE vectors via JavaScript injection
escalations.description: Seven Handlebars CVEs in Source/Backend including code injection via AST type confusion (CVSS 9.8). Any user-controlled template data is an RCE vector.
escalations.fix: cd Source/Backend && npm update handlebars  # target 4.7.9+

escalations.title: SSRF via orchestrator proxy path traversal
escalations.description: GET /api/orchestrator/../../health returns HTTP 200 from backend's own /health. req.url concatenated onto orchestrator base URL without sanitisation — any internal route is reachable without authentication.
escalations.fix: Validate path component does not contain '..' before forwarding; use URL+pathname normalisation.

escalations.title: CORS advertises unimplemented methods; Access-Control-Allow-Credentials may be over-broad
escalations.description: CORS headers advertise PATCH and DELETE globally but those methods 404. Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true needs review against allowedOrigins scope.
escalations.fix: Restrict allowed methods to GET,POST,OPTIONS or configure per-route. Audit credentials flag.

escalations.title: No rate limiting — orchestrator proxy amplifies unauthenticated requests to upstream
escalations.description: No express-rate-limit or equivalent on any endpoint. The /api/orchestrator proxy amplifies every unauthenticated request into an upstream call with no throttle.
escalations.fix: Add express-rate-limit (e.g. 100 req/min per IP) on proxy and write endpoints.

escalations.title: Stored XSS — raw HTML/JS accepted and stored verbatim
escalations.description: POST /api/feature-requests with <script>alert(1)</script> title returns 201 and stores verbatim. React default rendering is safe for text nodes, but any dangerouslySetInnerHTML call in the frontend triggers stored XSS.
escalations.fix: Reject or sanitize HTML/JS in title/description fields at service layer (sanitize-html or blocklist <script>, on* handlers).

p1_findings.title: getActivity() O(N×M) memory + O(N×M log N×M) sort on every dashboard request
p1_findings.fix: Replace cross-product flatten+sort with global pre-sorted ring buffer (cap ~1,000). Push to ring on every changeHistory write.

p1_findings.title: getQueue() returns full WorkItem objects including unbounded changeHistory[] for entire dataset
p1_findings.fix: Return summary projections only {id, docId, title, status, priority, assignedTeam}. Add per-bucket limit (default 10).

p1_findings.title: SSRF via orchestrator proxy path traversal — confirmed live exploit
p1_findings.fix: Sanitize path component before proxy forward. Block '..' sequences.

p1_findings.title: No timeout on orchestrator fetch() — infinite hang cascades to connection pool exhaustion
p1_findings.fix: Wrap fetch() with AbortController (30s timeout). Return 504 on expiry.

p1_findings.title: No SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers — hard kill on container stop, SQLite WAL not flushed
p1_findings.fix: Add process.on('SIGTERM') + process.on('SIGINT') handlers: server.close() → closeDb() → process.exit(0) with 15s force-kill fallback.

p2_findings.title: GET /api/search route missing — 5 tests will fail at runtime
p2_findings.fix: Implement Source/Backend/src/routes/search.ts and register in app.ts

p2_findings.title: Traceability enforcer never scans portal/ or platform/ — 1,068 Verifies comments unvalidated
Enforcer false-failure on dependency-linking plan — 7 spurious missing FR IDs
p2_findings.fix: Tighten extraction regex to table-column context only

p2_findings.title: 3 open dependency-linking gaps: api-types, seed.ts, 2 missing frontend test files
p2_findings.fix: Route to TheFixer — plan has exact implementation instructions

p2_findings.title: FR-TMP-001–010 (tiered-merge-pipeline) — zero enforced traceability in platform/
p2_findings.fix: Add traces to platform/ and extend enforcer, or formally mark platform/ spec-exempt in CLAUDE.md

p2_findings.title: path-to-regexp ReDoS (CVSS 7.5) in portal/Backend + platform/orchestrator
p2_findings.fix: npm audit fix in portal/Backend and platform/orchestrator

p2_findings.title: picomatch ReDoS + prototype pollution (CVSS 7.5) in portal/Frontend
findAll() 5 sequential O(n) filter passes + O(n log n) sort with Date parsing on every request
p2_findings.fix: Pre-parse updatedAt to epoch ms; add secondary status/type indexes

p2_findings.title: GET /api/work-items list serializes full changeHistory[] + assessments[] on every paginated response
p2_findings.fix: Add toListView() projection; return full object only from GET /api/work-items/:id

p2_findings.title: setDependencies() runs BFS cycle detection K times instead of once — O(K × BFS) per PATCH
p2_findings.fix: Single consolidated cycle check for all new deps in one BFS pass

p2_findings.title: Missing http_request_duration_seconds Histogram — cannot detect latency budget violations
p2_findings.fix: Add Histogram to metrics.ts + res.on('finish') middleware in app.ts

p2_findings.title: No uncaughtException/unhandledRejection handlers — any out-of-Express throw silently kills process
p2_findings.fix: Add process.on('uncaughtException') and process.on('unhandledRejection') with logging + exit(1)

p2_findings.title: GET /api/dashboard returns 404 — route declared but not served (possible startup import error)
p2_findings.fix: Check startup logs for import error on dashboardRouter; verify compiled output

p2_findings.title: Invalid JSON body returns HTTP 500 instead of 400
p2_findings.fix: Add SyntaxError check in errorHandler: if (err instanceof SyntaxError && 'body' in err) return 400

p2_findings.title: Pagination not validated — ?limit=99999 dumps full dataset (DoS vector)
p2_findings.fix: Clamp page ≥ 1, 1 ≤ limit ≤ 100. Return 400 for non-numeric inputs.

p2_findings.title: SSE stream errors silently swallowed — pump().catch(() => res.end()) discards error object
updateFeatureRequest/updateBug read-then-write not in transaction — concurrent double-apply race
p2_findings.fix: Wrap read-validate-write in db.transaction() — same pattern as voteOnFeatureRequest

p2_findings.title: No SQLite busy_timeout pragma — SQLITE_BUSY throws immediately under write contention → 500
p2_findings.fix: Add db.pragma('busy_timeout = 5000') after connection creation in getDb()

p2_findings.title: Dashboard activity: 6 unbounded SELECT * queries merged in memory — O(n·tables) heap per request
p2_findings.fix: Add LIMIT N (e.g. 500) to each per-table query before in-memory merge

p3_findings.title: Dual logger abstraction in Source/Backend (src/logger.ts + src/utils/logger.ts)
2 eslint-disable react-hooks/exhaustive-deps suppressions — stale closure risk
Portal dependency traces use non-canonical FR IDs — cannot cross-reference against plan
Vite path traversal + esbuild dev CSRF (CVE-MODERATE)
brace-expansion DoS (CVSS 6.5) in Source/Backend
pino 8.17.0 → 10.3.1 (2 major versions behind)
React 18 → 19 available; react-router-dom 6 → 7 available
uuid 9.0.0 → 13.0.0 (4 major versions behind)
OpenTelemetry packages 160+ minor versions behind in portal/Backend
portal/Backend: 577 transitive dependencies — large supply chain surface
picomatch appears in 4 duplicate instances in portal/Frontend — deduplication needed
Source/Backend: 310 dev vs 102 prod deps (3:1 ratio) — verify dev isolation
changeHistory array O(n) spread-copy on every write (should use push())
computeHasUnresolvedBlockers() called redundantly before isReady() in dispatch handler
No explicit body size limit on Source/Backend — Express default 100kb, oversized → 500 not 413
Oversized payload returns 500 instead of 413 in portal/Backend errorHandler
No try/catch in intake webhook route handlers — store throw propagates as HTML 500
No enum validation in intake routes — arbitrary type/priority strings stored
CORS advertises PATCH/DELETE but those methods 404 (TheGuardians — see escalations)
Method-not-allowed returns 404 HTML instead of 405 JSON + Allow header
closeDb() is dead code in production — never called from index.ts
No rate limiting — orchestrator proxy (TheGuardians — see escalations)
Stored XSS — raw HTML/JS stored verbatim (TheGuardians — see escalations)

p4_findings.title: Traceability enforcer default mode may target stale plan (most-recently-modified)
updateWorkItem store has no field whitelist — Object.assign accepts any Partial<WorkItem>
NaN from parseInt not explicitly validated in dashboard route — fragile NaN coercion
No database-level pagination in portal/Backend list queries — full table scan

cross_reference_map.root_cause: No projection layer — list endpoints return full objects with unbounded nested arrays
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Add toListView() projection in store layer; enforce pagination clamp on all list routes

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Dashboard service loads entire dataset on every request without pre-aggregation
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Ring buffer for activity (Source/Backend); LIMIT per-table for portal dashboard
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 3 findings across 2 specialists; prevents p95 budget breach at scale

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Missing Node.js process lifecycle management (signals, top-level error handlers)
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Add SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers calling closeDb(); add uncaughtException/unhandledRejection handlers
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 3 findings across 1 specialist; prevents silent process death and data loss

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Error middleware does not handle specific HTTP error types
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Extend errorHandler.ts to detect SyntaxError (400), entity.too.large (413), method-not-allowed (405)
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 3 findings across 1 specialist in a single middleware file edit

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Traceability enforcer has blind spots (scan dirs) and regex issues (ID extraction)
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Overhaul tools/traceability-enforcer.py: extend source_dirs to portal/, fix ID regex, add active-plan marker support
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 5 quality-oracle findings; closes the ~18% enforcer-invisible spec coverage gap
